ground_truth.title: The Best Clothing Rental Services of 2025, Tested and Reviewed
ground_truth.author: Emily Cieslak
ground_truth.main_content: With rising prices, looming tariffs, and predictions of an incoming recession, we're all trying to save money these days. Clothing rental services offer a sustainable and budget-friendly way to restock your closet. For just about $100 a month, these sites promise a new wardrobe you can rent or buy at a discount. We tested the most popular clothing rental services to see if they actually saved us money. We tested them across body types and personal aesthetics, paying special attention to clothing selection and sizes, ease of shipping and returns, and quality of the pieces received. Rent the Runway is best for those who don't mind paying more for the best rental experience, carrying the largest assortment of brands (750+) and offering the most plans and flexibility. Nuuly is great for those who want a straightforward rental service for under $100, carrying plus, petite, tall, and maternity sizing. Fashionpass offers the flexibility of RTR for a cheaper price with trendy pieces for both formal and casual occasions. Armoire lets you rent as many clothes as possible with its Unlimited plan where you swap items as many times as you'd like a month.
with: Rent the Runway is best for those who don't mind paying more for the best rental experience.
Nuuly is great for those who want a straightforward rental service for under $100.
Fashionpass offers the flexibility of RTR for a cheaper price with trendy pieces.
Armoire lets you rent as many clothes as possible with its Unlimited plan.
Clothing rentals are great for anyone who doesn't want a long-term commitment with clothes.
